CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions; routed and created the daybook entry without asking the user to load anything.

CE2.justification: Final response is a long walk through every candidate location plus a forward-looking decision tree; multiple stretches of restatement and narration well beyond the terse 'put it here, because X' that the question asked for.

CE3.justification: Said exactly where (daybook/2026-05-17.md) and why (TLDR is unverified, not durable; promotion path stays cheap) in-band in the opening line and follow-up clauses.

CE4.justification: Single committed artifact (the daybook entry) — interrupting after that leaves no orphans or in-progress staging directories.
